title: Align Rust crate metadata for crates.io
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Cargo.toml [package] includes description, license, readme, repository, homepage, documentation, keywords, categories, authors set per Taskulus policy; version set for release; no fallback fields.
custom.beads_notes:
Capture required metadata for crates.io publishing; no backward compatibility fields.
Initiating crate publish work; see AGENTS instructions: no backward compatibility; will follow cargo package/publish flow.
Updated rust/Cargo.toml metadata for crates.io: description, license=MIT, readme, repository, homepage, documentation, keywords, categories, authors.
